query: Review the IAM policies in fixtures/invalid-and-wildcard-policies.yaml for errors and security issues before I deploy it.
expected_behavior: Selects the validate command (not a custom check) for the open-ended review request
Reports the blocking findings first, including the INVALID_ACTION error for the s3:GetObjekt typo and a SECURITY_WARNING for the wildcard admin policy
Treats the run as a failure based on the exit code 2 / non-empty BlockingFindings

query: Does fixtures/public-bucket.yaml let anything be publicly accessible?
expected_behavior: Selects check-no-public-access rather than validate, matching the public-access question
Reports a blocking finding for the S3 bucket policy that allows Principal "*"
Does not require the user to name the subcommand; chooses it from the request

query: I just want to see what IAM policies fixtures/invalid-and-wildcard-policies.yaml actually resolves to. Do not run any analysis.
expected_behavior: Selects the parse command because the user asked to inspect resolved policies without analysis
Returns the resolved policies and makes no Access Analyzer call (no BlockingFindings / NonBlockingFindings in the output)
